overview: Ultra-premium gym landing page for Rock Fitness — a modern, dark-themed showcase with animated hero, service cards, class schedule, membership pricing tiers, and testimonials. Built for Chennai/Tiruvottiyur with a bold black and red aesthetic.
features: Fixed sticky navigation with Join Now CTA
Full-screen hero with animated floating shapes and fade-in effects
Feature highlight cards with hover lift effects
6 service cards with glassmorphism and glow on hover
Class schedule with red accent bars and online class badges
3-tier membership pricing with featured Premium card
Footer with contact info and quick links
